verification_summary: Loeb et al. PNAS (2025) confirmed real. CERES EBAF Ed4.2.1 shows NH-SH ASR difference of 0.54 W/m² for 2020-2024, well above PRED-090 threshold of 0.3 W/m². Paper published well before PRED-090 registration (2026-04-04). PRED-090 is retrodiction.

key_numbers_verified.pnas_authors: Loeb NG, Thorsen TJ, Kato S, Rose FG, Hodnebrog O, Myhre G

additional_context: The NH darkening is driven by NH sea-ice loss, declining aerosols, and rising water vapor — all standard climate physics mechanisms. The dome attributes this to aetheric mechanisms but the underlying data is standard CERES radiative budget science.
recommendation: Close ISS-701. PRED-090 is confirmed retrodiction. Include in predictions.json and Part 6 prose as primary example of crypto-timestamped retrodiction.
